en.name: Level 98 — Downtown Diner
en.shortDescription: A looping brick street whose sole destination is a nostalgic diner, haunted by ambiguous entities and echoes of yourself.
en.atmosphere: Eerie isolation shot through with homesick comfort — yellowed diner light against a barren street full of reflections.
en.tips: Enter the diner carefully. Approaching the entities triggers blackouts; sit still and the friendly patrons will engage peacefully.
